block1.title: Insisting on Quality, Creating Win-Win Outcomes
block1.description: AMC Materials strictly demands high quality and has passed various professional certifications. We actively introduce further professional standards to meet customer needs. By prioritizing product quality, production efficiency, and customer service, we ensure smooth cooperation and mutually beneficial new opportunities.

optical.title: Optical Material Converting
optical.desc: Providing cutting and converting services for various dimensions of optical films and OCA.

material.title: Functional Materials
material.desc: Optical/structural molding adhesives, shading & reflective tapes, peelable adhesives, protective films, and foam tapes.

cutting.title: Converting Services
cutting.desc: Customized converting services for optical and industrial films, including slitting, rewinding, lamination, and precision die-cutting.

block3.intro: Driven by market demand and founded on our core technological capabilities, AMC Materials develops advanced process technologies and key materials. We align with strategies such as waste reduction, environmental protection, customization, and cost advantage. Through continuous innovation and growth, we strive toward the goal of sustainable corporate operations.

tech1.title: Optical Functional Materials
tech1.desc: UV curing adhesives, optical clear adhesives (OCA), optical structural resins, and self-assembling materials.

tech2.title: Adhesive Application Materials
tech2.desc: Ultra-high adhesion, micro-adhesion, mixed high/low adhesion, and special adhesive formulations.

tech3.title: Converting Technologies
tech3.desc: CNC, wafer dicing, FT special-shaped cutting, precision die-cutting, lamination, slitting, roll cutting, and multi-layer film composite processing.
